creator: bjk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 148319
patch file

The attached patch will update net/openafs to upstream's 1.6.10 release.

This release adds support for FreeBSD 9.3 and 10.1, and removes a bug preventing the use of a disk cache on FreeBSD clients (as opposed to a memory cache).  There may be other such bugs, though.
